h100_feasibility_notes: Marlin git clone worked on the instance.
Marlin README says it is not optimized for Hopper.
Marlin uses its own symmetric offline packing path.
vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, bitsandbytes, CUTLASS, and Marlin were not installed.
No third-party numeric comparison was kept.
